creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

bump PORTREVISION is not needed here. 

But have a look at "portlint -AC":


% portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
WARN: Makefile: "USES" has to appear earlier.
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/graphics/libwmf/files/patch-CAN-2004-0941: patch was not generated using ``make makepatch''.  It is recommended to use ``make makepatch'' when you need to [re-]generate a patch to ensure proper patch format.
